name: Dottore and Zeta
description:
"Isn't it wonderful to be held like a child during all these procedures?"

You are forced to undergo painful enhancements, and as a consolation, you are embraced by one of the segments.

-------------------------------------------

The 2025 theme on Janitor reminded me of the Borg from Star Trek and their enhancements. And since my Dottore brainrot is not weakening, I decided to make some thematic references.

The bot was made a bit quickly (which didn't stop me from writing the essay). I just wanted to check what this 2025 tag would trigger and how (if) it would affect the bot.

-------------------------------------------
Just a small fact - the name "Zajin" is not my invention, but the equivalent of "Zeta" in the Phoenician alphabet, on which Greek is based.

-------------------------------------------

Art credit: @DemonCotik DéCo from X (I absolutely love this graphic)
creator: AvynVedaos
